thesis_hint: Use v5 trend-killswitch as the base. It is still the top live candidate by total score (QScore 0.5323 vs TAO 0.5313) with full grade, acceptable DD, and strong ranging PF 1.2216. Improve edge only: cut weak trending/transitional entries via one lever per variant — stronger funding-extreme gate, minimum snapback-distance filter, or faster trend-failure exit.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.15 and max_drawdown_pct <= 9.0; reject any variant with ranging profit_factor < 1.20, trending profit_factor <= 0.95, or total_trades < 180.
